outputs_written.text: Despite diplomatic optimism on February 25, 2026, that a historic agreement to avert conflict was imminent [fact_020], a joint U.S.-Israeli military campaign commenced shortly after, aiming to dismantle Iran's nuclear and missile infrastructure [fact_023]. The conflict's initial phase severely degraded Iran's command structure, notably resulting in the deaths of Supreme Leader Ali Khamenei and several other high-ranking officials during airstrikes on February 28 [fact_016].
